action.reasoning: Observation: Best auc_roc = 0.9999017 after fine-tuning 3-layer DKT for 130 total epochs (100 + 30). No further significant gains expected; model already near-perfect on validation proxy. Analysis: Remaining time ~23 min, 1 iteration. Additional training risks overfitting without measurable improvement. Decision: End experiment and submit final best score.
action.done_reason: Achieved near-perfect AUC 0.9999 on validation set, marginal improvements exhausted. Time and iteration budgets nearly spent. Finalizing.
